  Thanks for contributing! 🎉

  Please fill in as much as possible — even a few sentences help reviewers a lot.
  Provide a general summary of your changes in the PR title.

  For bug fixes, please link the related issue below.
  For new features, consider opening an issue for discussion first.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related Issue (if applicable)

<!-- Closes #... / Fixes #... / Related to #... -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 🛠️ Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ❌ Breaking change
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor
- [ ] 🧪 Tests
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] ⚙️ CI/CD or workflow change
- [ ] 📦 Chore or dependency update
- [ ] 🦀 Rust/FFI-only change
- [ ] 🐦 Flutter-only change
- [ ] 🎯 Dart-only change

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? What platforms/devices? -->

- [ ] Tested on Android
- [ ] Tested on iOS
- [ ] Tested on Linux
- [ ] Tested on macOS
- [ ] Tested on Windows
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's license
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] No new compiler warnings (Dart, Flutter, Rust)
- [ ] New public API is documented
- [ ] Tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Existing tests still pass
- [ ] FFI boundary is safe (if Rust changes included)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for non-trivial changes, if applicable)
